body.title: Memory palace: CC context-load reads palace, slim CLAUDE.md, kill memory files
body.result: CLAUDE.md slimmed 32% (rules first, palace pointer). context-load skill rewritten to query palace. MEMORY.md reduced to palace bootstrap. .claude/memory files left in place (orphaned — not indexed by MEMORY.md so CC won't autoload). Akien can delete after verification.
body.description: Rewrite context-load skill to query memory palace instead of reading .claude/memory files. Slim CLAUDE.md to rules + DB bootstrap only. Delete .claude/memory/*.md after migration confirmed. Blocked by T-memory-palace-populate.
